risks.title: FOX reports massive, record-shattering ratings for 2026 FIFA World Cup Final between Spain and Argentina
risks.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina drew 38.937 million viewers, shattering the English-language soccer broadcast record.

risks.title: The White House react to Ferran Torres wearing ‘Make Spain Great Again’ cap at World Cup celebrations
risks.description: Spain were crowned the 2026 World Cup champions over the weekend, with forward Ferran Torres opting to celebrate in an interesting way. The final, which took place at MetLife Stadium, saw both Spain and Argentina fail to score in 90 minutes of action.

risks.title: Mexico goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa retires after 22-year career
risks.description: The 41-year-old, who played in six FIFA World Cups, announces he will retire from both club and country.

risks.title: Fans react to Kylian Mbappe’s Cristiano Ronaldo-style FC 27 announcement after World Cup
risks.description: Real Madrid superstar Kylian Mbappe makes a major announcement just days after World Cup exit. Kylian Mbappe and France were eliminated from the 2026 FIFA World Cup by the eventual champions, Spain, in the semifinals of the tournament.
